heading: Donation of property; acquisition of lands
label: 433h Donation of property; acquisition of lands
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to accept donations of land, interests in land, buildings, structures, and other property within the boundaries of the said national monument as determined and fixed hereunder, and donations of funds for the purchase and maintenance thereof, the title and evidence of title to lands acquired to be satisfactory to the Secretary of the Interior: , That he may acquire on behalf of the United States out of any donated funds, either by purchase at prices deemed by him reasonable, or by condemnation under the provisions of , such tracts of land within the said national monument as may be necessary for the completion thereof.Providedsection 3113 of title 40
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “the Act of ” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works.Section 3113 of title 40Pub. L. 107–217, § 5(c)116 Stat. 1303August 1, 1888Aug. 21, 2002
